turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: I have the opinion of the Court to announce in No. 02-575, Nike, Inc. versus Kasky. The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted. Justice Stevens filed a concurring opinion in which Justice Ginsburg joined and in which Justice Souter joined as to part three; Justice Kennedy filed a dissenting opinion; Justice Breyer filed a dissenting opinion in which Justice O'Connor joined.
